required_columns_or_fields: case_id; section_id; plane_a_location; plane_b_location; unit_normal; pressure_average_basis; time_basis
definition_or_rule: every pressure extraction must name the actual planes and averaging convention
admission_implication: missing metadata makes rows diagnostic only

definition_or_rule: dp_static_gross = p_static_in - p_static_out; sign convention follows flow direction
admission_implication: gross static change alone is not an irreversible loss

required_columns_or_fields: z_start_m; z_end_m; rho path or rho_ref; dp_hydrostatic_Pa
definition_or_rule: dp_hydrostatic = integral rho g dz/ds ds; density basis recorded
admission_implication: missing hydrostatic correction blocks component K
missing kinetic correction blocks pressure-recovery interpretation

required_columns_or_fields: L_segment_m; D_h_m; x_from_hydraulic_reset_m; fD_FD_ref; fD_dev_active; dp_straight_pipe_correction_Pa
definition_or_rule: subtract or intentionally retain straight/developing loss before naming component, cluster, or section K
admission_implication: unseparated straight loss forces section/cluster naming

definition_or_rule: dp_loss = dp_static - dp_hydrostatic - dp_kinetic - dp_straight; normalize only with stated rho/u basis
admission_implication: valid only for named section and source envelope

definition_or_rule: K values are not comparable unless velocity basis is explicit; near-zero U makes K ill-conditioned

required_columns_or_fields: included_fittings; fitting_id; fitting_cluster_id; component_isolation_flag; cluster_loss_flag; recovery_length_D
definition_or_rule: name coefficient as component_K only if component isolation and recovery are demonstrated
admission_implication: failed isolation means K_section or K_cluster only

definition_or_rule: F_A = area with u_n<0 divided by total area
admission_implication: nonzero F_A is diagnostic; threshold not universal

definition_or_rule: F_m = reverse absolute mass divided by absolute mass; signed mdot is separate
admission_implication: high reverse mass blocks ordinary one-stream K/F6 admission

definition_or_rule: secondary-flow strength relative to normal kinetic measure
admission_implication: large unresolved secondary flow supports invalid-single-stream flag

definition_or_rule: component K rejected when recovery is not demonstrated or intentionally included in cluster
admission_implication: missing recovery diagnostics force section/cluster labels

required_columns_or_fields: T_bulk; rho; u_n; cp; T field; averaging_basis
definition_or_rule: T_b = integral rho u_n cp T dA / integral rho u_n cp dA unless constant-cp simplification recorded
admission_implication: unrecorded T_b basis blocks Nu/h comparisons

required_columns_or_fields: wall_area; wall_heat_flux; wall_temperature; q_wall_total; h_internal; Nu_internal
definition_or_rule: h = qbar/(T_wall - T_bulk); Nu = h D_h/k; wall and bulk averages stated
admission_implication: section-effective if stratification or recirculation is large

required_columns_or_fields: Q_heater_to_salt; Q_jacket; Q_passive; Q_storage; Q_residual; internal/wall/external/radiation labels
definition_or_rule: energy ledger keeps jacket, passive, storage, radiation, wall, and residual separate
admission_implication: do not absorb heat residual into internal Nu

required_columns_or_fields: source_status; source_use_category; source_key; validity_Re_min/max; geometry_match; boundary_condition_match
definition_or_rule: each closure-like row carries source status and failure criterion
admission needs same quantity, same basis, and uncertainty status
admission_implication: missing same-QOI UQ keeps row diagnostic

definition_or_rule: allowed names include straight_section, fitting, cluster, branch_apparent, section_effective, unresolved
admission_implication: universal K/fD/Nu names rejected for section-effective or diagnostic rows
